flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Worcester State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.6k → $11.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Worcester State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).
